source_signal: SME New Concept Proposal — no existing NCIt cell type for testicular NSGCT
rationale: A malignant human germ cell type characterized by differentiated, non-seminomatous embryonic or extraembryonic lineages—including embryonal carcinoma, yolk sac tumor, choriocarcinoma, or teratoma structural variations. These cells are typically aggressive, display variable secretion of tumor markers (AFP and/or beta-hCG), and are capable of rapid metastatic progression.
sme_notes: File with NCI EVS for inclusion in NCIt; golden set entry for C27787 blocked until concept is added.
